# GlyphGuard

> GlyphGuard is a mobile app that detects homoglyph phishing, suspicious domains, and scam links with offline-first analysis.

/ : Main landing page for GlyphGuard. Includes app description, quick facts, FAQ, store links, and screenshots.
/privacy-policy.html : Privacy policy for GlyphGuard, including offline-first analysis and limited network use for threat updates and optional online checks.

## Key entities

- Product: GlyphGuard
- Type: Mobile security and utility app
- Platforms: iOS, Android
- Main use cases: homoglyph phishing detection, suspicious links, scam pages, risky domains, QR content review
- Contact: glyphguard.app@gmail.com
